flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Northcentral University are 4% above 6-year earnings ($46.8k → $48.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northcentral University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Northcentral University rose 98% between 2007 and 2009 (211 → 418).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Northcentral University fell 22% between 2008 and 2009 ($9.9k → $7.8k).
